name: Seamless OS Migration to CTyunOS | openEuler
description: China Telecom deployed 30,000 CTyunOS instances based on openEuler, seamlessly replacing the original OS across all scenarios using openEuler's six-step migration solution and x2openEuler tool, boosting overall platform performance by over 10%.

headline: Seamless OS Migration to CTyunOS
description: China Telecom deployed 30,000 CTyunOS instances based on openEuler, seamlessly replacing the original OS across all scenarios using openEuler's six-step migration solution and x2openEuler tool, boosting overall platform performance by over 10%.

about.name: CTyunOS
about.description: Self-developed OS by China Telecom based on openEuler, fully adapted to China Telecom eCloud services by August 2022.

about.name: x2openEuler
about.description: openEuler migration assessment and in-place upgrade tool that migrates existing CentOS to openEuler within two hours without redeploying services or reconfiguring parameters.

mentions.name: China Telecom
mentions.description: Released self-developed CTyunOS based on openEuler in 2021 and deployed 30,000 CTyunOS instances to support cloudification and digital transformation.

mainEntity.name: openEuler Six-Step OS Migration Solution
mainEntity.description: CTyunOS adopts openEuler's six-step migration solution for seamless OS replacement from CentOS to openEuler.

step.name: Create a migration support team
step.text: Establish a dedicated team to oversee and support the OS migration process.

step.name: Conduct migration analysis
step.text: Use x2openEuler to perform thorough analysis of hardware, software, and configurations, including upper-layer software interface changes, dependency versions, and post-migration OS configurations.

step.name: Design a migration plan
step.text: Develop a comprehensive migration plan based on the analysis results.

step.name: Adapt software before migration
step.text: Ensure all software is adapted and compatible before the actual migration begins.

step.name: Implement migration
step.text: Use x2openEuler in-place upgrade to migrate existing CentOS to openEuler within two hours, without redeploying services or reconfiguring parameters.

step.name: Perform testing and rollout
step.text: Conduct thorough testing and execute the rollout to production environments.
